assertions.title: State directory migration

steps.action: Create temporary test directory with .fase/ containing test content
steps.observed: Test directory created successfully with test content
.fase/ still exists, .cogent/ was not created - migration did not occur

steps.expected: Migration triggered if not done by previous command
Migration triggered when accessing state directory

steps.observed: Original content remains in .fase/ - migration never occurred

assertions.issues: Migration from .fase/ to .cogent/ is not implemented. Code investigation revealed MigrateLegacyRepoStateDirFrom() in internal/core/paths.go (lines 198-200) is a stub that returns nil without performing any migration. The function is called from ResolvePathsForRepo() but has no implementation. No references to '.fase' exist in the Go codebase, confirming migration logic was never implemented.

summary: Tested 1 assertion: VAL-RENAME-003 FAILED. The state directory migration from .fase/ to .cogent/ is not implemented - MigrateLegacyRepoStateDirFrom() is a no-op stub function. The .fase/ directory remains unchanged after running cogent commands, and .cogent/ is never created.
